content.en:
So, the Sumeru Realm God took a group of high-level realm gods to return to the realm of the realm of the realm on the boundless sailboat.

Along the way, the gods of the Sumeru realm still shuttled according to the original path, and did not deviate a little.

Obviously, this is indeed the safest path researched by Taihao Tianzhu Palace, and he does not dare to change it in the slightest.

After a period of time, the Boundless Sailing Ship finally returned to the realm of the Realm Gods, and a group of high-level realm gods returned.

But compared to when he went, there were more high-level realm gods who had fallen.

Before the many high-level realm gods left, the Sumeru realm gods said: "Everyone, when you recover from your injuries and still want to go there, after another ten billion to the Dao Era, our Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace will organize another operation to go to that super dimensional treasure land, you can come again!"

Some high-level realm gods were eager to try, but many high-level realm gods hurriedly shook their heads, obviously not daring to go.

After all, so many high-level realm gods have fallen this time, and they are lucky that they did not fall, and they will be lucky next time.

But there must be high-level realm gods who dare to try.

In addition, there were many high-level realm gods in the top forces before who did not dare to come, but if they saw many high-level realm gods cultivating breakthroughs, and even some high-level realm gods were promoted to peak realm gods, they would definitely try.

Therefore, Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace gave 10 billion Dao Eras, which is to give preparation time.

......

Eternal borders.

Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance, Terran Temple.

Ye Tian's copy body that came back from the Death Void came here, and took out the resources one by one.

"There are a total of three hundred and sixty-two items, of which sixty-three are treasures involving extradimensional powers. "

Ye Tian muttered.

These sixty-three treasures are not extra-dimensional things, but contain a little extra-dimensional power, which is still different from the Kun Realm wood fragments.

As for the specific use of these resources, Ye Tian was not very clear, he did not study these items in that super dimensional treasure land, but now he had time to study them.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian continued to study the treasures here.

One treasure after another was researched by Ye Tian, but some resources could not be studied.

Ye Tian guessed that his cultivation was low, and he couldn't really use these resource treasures, or maybe some resources were helpful to extradimensional creatures, but they were of little use to him, so he couldn't really study them.

After a period of time, Ye Tian studied everything that he was able to study.

He found that many resources are helpful for his own improvement, such as some resources that can refine the physical body, and there is a tendency to make the physical body extra-dimensional, but it is not the kind of disadvantaged super-dimensional assimilation, but the super-dimensional evolution of the benefit class.

After this kind of refining, the price he paid for the extradimensional things will be reduced, but unfortunately the help is limited, and it is more to make the physical body stronger.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also found three resources that would help him improve the Eternal Dao Seed.

These three resources are a kind of gray metal, called Dark Escape Xuanjin, which contains a little bit of extradimensional power, which can temper the Eternal Dao Species, and the effect is very good, and it has no great impact on the Eternal Dao Species, and the side effects are not obvious.

The other is called the Extradimensional Heavenly Devouring Grass, which has a side effect, that is, it will cause weakness for a certain period of time, which will make the combat effectiveness drop a lot.

However, Ye Tian didn't care about this defect, he had a lot of copy bodies, let one of them copy the body to practice, if he was weak, he would be weak, as long as he passed the weakness period, there would be no problem.

"Let's still use the Dark Escape Xuanjin and the Super Dimensional Heavenly Devouring Grass to improve and refine the Eternal Dao Seed, the effect is also very good, with the Super Dimensional Source Swallowing Technique, my cultivation speed is definitely more than a thousand times faster than now. "

Ye Tian said confidently.

In the following days, Ye Tian worked hard to cultivate and refine his eternal Dao species.

His other replica bodies were still looking for resources in the Death Void's Extra-Dimensional Treasure Land, and one of the replica bodies came out of this Extra-Dimensional Treasure Land, preparing to find a suitable Death Void area and open up a long-term cave as a base for his future exploration in the Death Void.

That super dimensional treasure land is still not very suitable, after all, after ten billion to the Dao Era, Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace will still send high-level realm gods to enter, and it will be easy to be discovered at that time, so it will be difficult to come out at that time. []

......

Ye Tian's replica body had just come out of the Super Dimensional Treasure Land, and he casually chose a direction to explore.

As a result, it wasn't long before danger came in.

He shuttled and crashed into a gray area, only to be annihilated in an instant.

Then, he changed his direction, and it didn't take long to fly, he saw the treasure, and before he could get close, he was instantly killed by an incomparably terrifying extradimensional creature with a flash of light.

Keep changing directions and get killed!

Being killed again and again, Ye Tian finally saw the horror of the Death Void.

Here, the high-level realm gods are like ants, and no, the average peak realm god is also an ant.

Even if his duplicate body did not fuse with extradimensional things, it was still a weak peak realm god combat power, and the result was still killed in seconds.

From this point of view, there is nothing wrong with 087 for the Sumeru Realm God to be so cautious, and the peak realm god who dares to be careless has already fallen into the Death Void.

After many falls, Ye Tian finally researched a safe route that was not long, and then came to a huge mountain range that stood across the Void of Death.

He explored the mountain range, and apart from a few places where it was extremely dangerous and could not be approached, there was a small area that was relatively safe, and as long as he did not go to other places, he would not be killed.

So, he opened a cave dojo in an area of this mountain range and built a palace where he began his retreat.

In the short term, it is still relatively safe here, but he can't guarantee whether it will be safe all the time.

But the Death Void is so dangerous, it would be nice to have a safe place for the time being.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's other copy bodies found one treasure after another in that super dimensional treasure land, and every once in a while, he would send out a part of his resources and send them to his dojo in the Death Void.

In this way, he accumulated more and more resources.

And on this day, he finally saw the real extradimensional thing in that extradimensional treasure land, but it was only a low-level extradimensional thing.

But as long as it is a low-level extra-dimensional thing, it can be fused and thus control the power of extra-dimensionality.
